title: ipomoea cheliensis
intro: Ipomoea cheliensis, also known as Moonflower or Cheliensis Morning Glory, is a species of flowering plant in the Convolvulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is valued for its ability to relieve various health issues. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, calming the nerves, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Ipomoea cheliensis is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
